creator: yanegomi@gmail.com
text:
> which is explained to be a DMI/SMBIOS entry point in amd64/NOTES. No
> further information available, not known whether this option is a
> prerequisite for any readings of the DMI by userland software.

    In short, no. Many SMBIOS applications like dmidecode poke
directly at /dev/mem .
Thanks.
-Garrett
